description_long: This sculpture depicts a partially completed or intentionally rough-hewn male human figure, standing upright with one leg slightly forward and the other leg back. The figure is missing its head and arms, and the surface is unfinished in some areas, giving it a raw, almost ancient appearance. The body is muscular and anatomically detailed, with a prominent torso and defined legs. The figure is supported by a roughly shaped vertical block attached to the back of the right leg, which merges into the rectangular base. The entire sculpture is rendered in a pale, stone-like material, and it stands on a flat, dark rectangular plinth. The overall impression is classical, reminiscent of Renaissance or ancient Greek statuary.
description: A headless, armless male figure in stone, muscular and unfinished, stands upright on a dark rectangular base with a supporting block behind one leg.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the muscular torso, left leg forward, and the supporting block attached to the right leg.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the back muscles, buttocks, and the full extent of the supporting block merging into the base.
description_view_2: Front-right view with clear visibility of the right leg, the supporting block, and the unfinished surface details.
description_view_3: Frontal view focusing on the chest, abdomen, and both legs, with the supporting block partially visible behind the right leg.
attribute_location_context: No specific setting is visible; the sculpture appears isolated on a plain background.
